title: Login Issues - Can't Access Account
description: Customer cannot log into the system and receives an invalid credentials error.

title: Payment Failed - Card Declined
description: Customer attempted to complete payment but the card was declined multiple times.

title: Unable to Download Invoice
description: Customer cannot download invoice from the billing section.

title: Incorrect Billing Address
description: Billing address is displayed incorrectly after checkout.

title: App Crash on Startup
description: Mobile application crashes immediately after launching.

title: Refund Not Processed
description: Customer requested refund but it hasn't been processed yet.

title: Password Reset Email Not Received
description: Customer tried to reset password but did not receive reset email.

title: Slow Dashboard Loading
description: Dashboard takes too long to load for some users.

title: Notifications Not Showing
description: Customer reports missing notifications in the app.

title: Account Suspended Unexpectedly
description: User account was suspended without warning.

title: Duplicate Charges
description: Customer was charged twice for the same order.

title: Profile Update Not Saving
description: Changes to profile information are not being saved.

title: Search Feature Not Working
description: Search results are not appearing after entering keywords.

title: Order History Missing
description: Customer cannot see previous orders in their account.
